summary: Completed frontend testing of quotation builder app. Core functionality working well including drag-drop, calculations, and UI components. Minor session persistence issue identified.

integration_issues.issue: Sections and items disappear between page interactions, suggesting session storage may not be persisting data properly

passed_tests: Page loads with correct 70%/30% panel layout
All 15 catalog items present in 3 categories (5 each: Bathroom, Living Room, Bedroom)
Client input fields (Name, Project Title, Date) work properly
Add Subsection dialog opens and creates sections successfully
Drag and drop from catalog to sections works correctly
Real-time price calculations work (Grand Total: ₹1,03,000 for 2 items)
Empty state message displays when no subsections exist
Export PDF button exists and becomes enabled with content
CSV upload button exists and is clickable
action_item_for_main_agent: Investigate session persistence issue - sections and items are not maintaining state between interactions. This may affect user experience during quotation building.
